full_name: Austenitic-ferritic (duplex) stainless steel X2CrNiMoN22-5-3, material number 1.4462 (Duplex 2205, UNS S32205/S31803)
scope: The most widely used duplex stainless steel, with a roughly 50/50 austenite-ferrite microstructure giving about double the yield strength of standard austenitics plus high resistance to pitting, crevice and stress-corrosion cracking. Used in chemical process, oil and gas, marine and pressure equipment.
license_note: Duplex 2205 grade name and its nominal composition and typical property ranges are widely published in free manufacturer datasheets and reference sites; no paywalled EN standard text reproduced.
